name: Saladin
flavor: Realms at War — legendary commander reprising Salah ad-Din, the Ayyubid sultan. A master of maneuver, attrition and the feigned retreat; at Hattin he used superior mobility to harass, encircle and exhaust his foe. Renowned for chivalry. His Stratagems reward mobility and wearing the enemy down rather than meeting them head-on.

orderAction.name: Command
orderAction.summary: Play 1 Command token on one of your Warriors currently in play.
